rotation_note: Selected BTC (worst signal accuracy at 20.4% 3d verdict + record ETF outflows) and XAG (below-coinflip 49.4% consensus with active position) for deep dive.

key_predictive_features: ETF flow direction and magnitude (record $2.97B outflow streak is strongest bearish signal)
Fear & Greed Index (58.6% accuracy, only BUY-signal — contrarian at extremes)
MVRV Z-Score (60% accuracy on-chain, 45 samples — promising but small)
Regime state (trending-down 100% SELL today per L2 journal)
fundamental_drivers: ETF flow reversal is the #1 catalyst — cumulative $55.66B still positive but $2.97B 10-session outflow unprecedented
Oil/inflation transmission: Brent $92-108 keeps Fed on hold, preventing liquidity easing BTC needs
MicroStrategy narrative damage: first-ever BTC sale broke 'never sell' covenant, prediction market chaos
Halving cycle: 26 months post-April-2024 halving. Historical peak window was 12-18 months — we're PAST it.

cross_asset_correlations.MSTR: Strong proxy correlation. MSTR -6% when BTC -2% today. Holds 815-840K BTC.
cross_asset_correlations.ETH: ETH follows BTC with higher beta — ETH 49.9% consensus even worse than BTC 52.7%
cross_asset_correlations.XAU: Negative short-term (gold up = risk-off = BTC down in current regime). Long-term uncertain.
cross_asset_correlations.OIL: Oil elevated = inflation = no rate cuts = BTC bearish. Key transmission mechanism.

seasonal_patterns: June historically mixed for BTC — no strong seasonal signal
Post-halving cycle timing suggests we're past the typical peak window
papers_and_models: CNN-LSTM + Boruta feature selection: 82% directional accuracy (ScienceDirect). Feature selection critical — raw on-chain has multicollinearity.
SVM achieves 83% accuracy, 82% F1 on BTC direction using on-chain features
3-state NHMM (bull/bear/consolidation) outperforms 2-state for BTC 4h candles — consolidation regime is where BUY signals fail
recommended_new_signals: ETF flow momentum signal (7-day rolling sum of daily flows, threshold at -$500M cumulative)
MSTR premium/discount to NAV as BTC sentiment proxy (currently 25.6% overvalued per GF Value)
3-state regime classifier specifically for crypto (current 2-state misses consolidation)
deep_dives.implementation_notes: System BTC 3d verdict accuracy is 20.4% (n=162) — worse than random. Priority should be improving BTC-specific signals before taking any BTC positions. On-chain signal (60%, 45 samples) is most promising but needs larger sample. LLM BTC 3h accuracy 45.2% = noise.

key_predictive_features: Fear & Greed Index — 93.8% accuracy on XAG (per L2 journal). Dominant high-accuracy signal.
Qwen3 — 60.3% on XAG (per L2). Strong SELL accuracy (72.6%).
Gold-silver ratio — currently ~60:1 near historical average. Not signaling extreme.
ATR stop distance — $74.00 stop is 1.6% below current $75.22.
fundamental_drivers: Sixth consecutive annual supply deficit (Silver Institute) — 762M oz drawn from above-ground stockpiles since 2021
Industrial demand: solar panels, EVs, AI data centers all increasing consumption
BofA raised 2026 average forecast to $85.93/oz (+32% increase)
Gold-silver ratio at 60:1 — at historical average, not stretched. Compression thesis to 50:1 still active.
FOMC June 16-17 hold expected but 4 dissenters signal future dovish tilt — eventually bullish metals

cross_asset_correlations.XAU: Strong positive correlation. Gold leads, silver follows with higher beta.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY: Inverse correlation — strong USD pressures silver. But DXY impact currently muted by geopolitical premium.
cross_asset_correlations.OIL: Indirect: oil↑ → inflation↑ → gold↑ → silver↑ (safe haven). But also oil↑ → no rate cuts → mixed for industrial demand.
cross_asset_correlations.BTC: Weak/negative short-term. Metals-crypto rotation thesis still active.

seasonal_patterns: Late summer to fall typically stronger for precious metals (Indian wedding season demand)
papers_and_models: COT positioning: managed funds gently building net-longs — not stretched either direction. Room for speculative buying.
Gold-silver ratio mean reversion: ratio at 60:1 (historical avg). Above 80:1 = strong silver BUY. Current = neutral.
Silver Institute supply deficit projections support structural bull case through 2027
recommended_new_signals: Silver ETF flow signal (SLV/SIVR daily flow direction + magnitude)
Gold-silver ratio absolute level (>80 = silver BUY, <50 = gold BUY, 50-80 = neutral)
Indian import demand seasonal pattern (quarterly, peaks Q3-Q4)
deep_dives.implementation_notes: XAG signals' BUY accuracy has collapsed across the board (15-35%) while SELL accuracy remains strong (56-87%). The directional gate is suppressing BUY votes correctly. For XAG specifically, adx_regime_switch at 36.5% was the worst offender — now disabled. Remaining regime signals (drift 58.9%, amihud 58.6%) are better. Position is small (26.92oz) with tight stop ($74.00). The $120 prophecy requires patience not signal accuracy.
